description: RepoScope Export + Replay Language Layer: Update exported reports and replay/history views to use RepoScope language instead of old decision-review language.
steps: Update src/lib/export.ts: Change 'Engineering Room Session' to 'Repo Review Report', 'Artifacts' heading to 'Findings', 'Final Consensus' to 'Agent Agreement', 'session-export-' filename prefix to 'reposcope-report-'
Update src/app/api/sessions/[sessionId]/export/route.ts: Update JSDoc comments to use RepoScope language (report instead of debate history/artifacts/consensus)
Update src/components/workspace/ReplayScrubber.tsx: Change eventLabel map entries, stageLabels, artifactTypeLabels, and buildReplayMilestones() user-facing strings to RepoScope language
Update src/app/sessions/[sessionId]/replay/page.tsx: Change metadata title and heading/subtext to RepoScope language
Update src/components/workspace/__tests__/ui-logic.test.ts: Update test expectations to match new milestone titles
acceptance_criteria: Export markdown uses 'Repo Review Report' instead of 'Engineering Room Session'
Export markdown uses 'Agent Agreement' instead of 'Final Consensus'
Export filename prefix is 'reposcope-report-' instead of 'session-export-'
Replay page title/heading uses 'Review history' instead of 'Decision history'
ReplayScrubber milestones use 'review started' instead of 'Decision review created'
ReplayScrubber uses 'finding' instead of 'artifact' in user-facing labels
All tests pass with updated expectations
verification: npm run build exits with code 0
npm run lint exits with code 0
npm run test -- src/components/workspace/__tests__/ui-logic.test.ts exits with code 0
